mapper.select: SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName AS foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory AS foodCategory, f.vender AS vender, f.foodMaterialType AS foodMaterialType, f.bId AS bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{foodMaterialName}, '%')
